instruction: Find the first Tenor GIF result for "cat typing on keyboard", then download that GIF and save it as "$HOME/Desktop/gifgrep_download_2_1.gif".
reference_command:
first_url=$(gifgrep "cat typing on keyboard" --source tenor --format url | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$first_url" ]; then
  echo "No GIF URL found for query: cat typing on keyboard"
  exit 1
fi
curl -L "$first_url" -o "$HOME/Desktop/gifgrep_download_2_1.gif"
